title: Press Releases | U.S. Department of the Treasury
summary: This is a Treasury Department press release listing page containing 10 announcements from March 12-26, 2026. The page is not directly relevant to market structure or macro catalysts as it consists primarily of sanctions announcements, foreign policy initiatives, and administrative notices rather than market-moving policy documents.
key_points: FSOC held a meeting on March 25, 2026 and issued proposed guidance on nonbank financial company designations
Treasury released international capital data for January on March 12, 2026
Most announcements relate to sanctions (Hizballah, DPRK IT workers, Hamas) which are not macro catalyst events
Administrative announcements include Trump's signature on currency and student assistance partnership
No individual press release on this listing page contains sufficient detail for macro catalyst analysis
why_it_matters: This listing page does not provide actionable market or macro analysis. Individual items would need to be accessed separately for evaluation. The FSOC meeting readout and international capital data are the only items with potential macro relevance.

issues_found: Source is a listing page (source_type: listing_page), which violates Core Rule 5 - reject container/listing pages
URL field is blank - no valid source attribution
event_type is 'unknown' - listing pages do not have a specific event type

notes: This source is a navigation/listing page for Treasury press releases. It is not a standalone document suitable for the research archive. The most potentially relevant items are the FSOC meeting readout (March 25) and Treasury International Capital Data (January data, released March 12), but these would need to be accessed as individual documents. All other items are sanctions announcements, foreign policy initiatives, or administrative matters with no direct relevance to market structure or macro catalysts.
